top_signals.title: US 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 as Selloff Deepens
top_signals.summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concerns mount that accelerating inflation will force central bankers to raise interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
